name: Foulborn Ventor's Gamble
explicitMods: 18% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills
flavourText: In a blaze of glory,
An anomaly defying all odds
The "unkillable" beast met the divine
And Ventor met his latest trophy.

name: Elixir of the Unbroken Circle
explicitMods:
Recover 4% of Life per Endurance Charge on use
Lose all Endurance Charges on use
Gain 1 Endurance Charge per Second during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.
flavourText: Nothing endures. All things end.
Then, they begin again.

typeLine: Alchemist's Jade Flask of the Armadillo
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Kalandra's Touch
flavourText: On one hand, you have a choice.
On the other, you have its twin.

name: Mageblood
explicitMods: Magic Utility Flasks cannot be Used
Leftmost 4 Magic Utility Flasks constantly apply their Flask Effects to you
Magic Utility Flask Effects cannot be removed
flavourText: Rivers of power course through your veins.

name: Bubonic Trail
explicitMods: Triggers Level 20 Death Walk when Equipped
52% reduced Duration of Elemental Ailments on You while affected by a Rare Abyss Jewel
30% increased Movement Speed while affected by a Magic Abyss Jewel
24% increased Reservation Efficiency of Skills while affected by a Unique Abyss Jewel
flavourText: Even the dead serve the Lightless.

properties.name: Spell, AoE, Duration, Fire, Physical, Guard

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that adds to your armour, and can take some of the damage from hits for you before being depleted. When the buff expires or is depleted, the skill deals reflected damage to enemies around you based on the total damage that was taken from the buff. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods: This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect

75% of Damage from Hits is taken from the Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to 10% of your Armour, up to a maximum of 5000
Reflects 3270% of Damage taken from Buff as Fire Damage when Buff expires or is depleted
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: While this skill is active, supported spells will be repeatedly triggered.
explicitMods: Each Supported Spell will Trigger when its Cooldown is over
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Supported Spells are Triggered when their Cooldowns are over
hybrid.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that are instant and have no reservation. Cannot support Vaal skills or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

properties.name: Spell, Movement, Duration, Fire, Travel, Blink

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies and leaving a trail of burning ground. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills.
explicitMods: Deals 138.9 Base Fire Damage per second
Modifiers to Spell Damage apply to this Skill's Damage Over Time effect
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.name: Tecrod's Gaze
explicitMods:
40% increased Main Hand Critical Strike Chance per
Murderous Eye Jewel affecting you, up to a maximum of 200%

+20% to Off Hand Critical Strike Multiplier per
Murderous Eye Jewel affecting you, up to a maximum of +100%
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an Abyssal Socket on an Item or into an allocated Jewel Socket on the Passive Skill Tree. Right click to remove from the Socket.
flavourText: The Hated Slave seeks dominion over his own kind.

name: Reefbane
explicitMods: Glows while in an Area containing a Unique Fish
flavourText: He cast far into the ocean
And tore out her heart.

typeLine: Alchemist's Quartz Flask of the Owl
explicitMods: 65% reduced Effect of Curses on you during Effect
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: The Dark Seer
enchantMods: Quality does not increase Physical Damage
Grants 1% increased Area of Effect per 4% Quality
explicitMods: +2 to Level of all Spell Skill Gems
10% Global chance to Blind Enemies on hit
Enemies Blinded by you have Malediction
flavourText: Feed on the light of the living,
Bring darkness to all I see,
Until we are one in shadow.

properties.name: Lightning, Melee, Attack, AoE, Duration, Strike, Aura

socketedItems.secDescrText: Performs a melee attack, and causes lightning to strike a nearby enemy, dealing damage in an area. Each target can only be hit once by this skill. Hitting an enemy grants an aura for a duration. Requires a Sword, Axe, Mace, Sceptre, Staff or Unarmed.
explicitMods: 50% of Physical Damage Converted to Lightning Damage
Aura grants 13 to 239 added Lightning Damage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports aura skills that affect you and allies, increasing the aura's effect on allies, but preventing it from affecting you at all. Cannot support curse auras, or other auras that only affect enemies. Cannot support skills used by totems. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 36% increased Aura Area of Effect
Supported Auras do not affect you
Non-Curse Auras from Supported Skills have 39% increased Effect
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

properties.name: Attack, Melee, AoE, Movement, Travel, Physical

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 252 to 378 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.
